paragraphs: IATF y…õ adwuma w…î baguam w…î …îkwan a w…îfa so di dwuma no so. Nkrataa a w…îde k…î IAT F mu w…î w…õbsaet, e-mail, Discord, GitHub, anaa akwan foforo so no betumi ab…õy…õ baguamu nkrataa.

IATF b…õtumi atwe adwene asi biribi so, akyer…õkyer…õ mu, anaa ay…õ no foforo ansa na w…îab…î ho dawuru s…õnea …õb…õy…õ a w…îb…õtumi asusu hia a …õho hia s…õ w…în nsa ka ns…õm no ho a w…îrenyi w…în ho ns…õm biara a …õho nhia adi.
Wubetumi asie nkrataa a w…îhwehw…õ no w…î IATF GitHub ahyehy…õde no mu, w…î w…õbsaet yi so, anaa ne nyinaa mu.

Ansa na IATF b…õtintim no, …õs…õ s…õ woyi nkitahodi ho ns…õm a …õho nhia, nnipa bi din, ne w…în a w…îde mmoa a w…îde di dwuma no ho ns…õm nyinaa fi h…î, gye s…õ w…în ani da so s…õ w…îb…õtintim na …õfata.

IATF no mfa Discord nk…îmm…îb…î no nto h…î, na Discord na …õhw…õ ns…õm no so. Gyinae ahorow a w…îsi w…î Discord mu no, …õs…õ s…õ w…îtoto no tiawa w…î baguam kyer…õwtoh…î a …õw…î GitHub so anaa w…î …îf√£ a …õfa adwuma no ho.

Wontumi mfa ns…õm a w…îhwehw…õ no ny…õ adwuma w…î search engine indexing mu. Public kyer…õ s…õ wobetumi ahwehw…õ mu na w…îadi ho akontaa. ∆ênkyer…õ s…õ w…îasiesie no yiye ama w…în a w…îb…õhu no denam din a w…îb…õhwehw…õ so.

IATF betumi asesa anaa ayi nkrataa afi baabi a w…îhw…õ no so, nanso entumi mma kwan s…õ wobeyi afiri baabi a nnipa a w…în ho nni mfaso te te te s…õ caches, notifications, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, anaa mfiri afoforo so.
S…õ as…õm bi hia s…õ …õk…î so y…õ kokoam as…õm a, mfa IATF baguam akwan so nk…î.

paragraphs: W…îpaw …îmampanyin no afe biara, w…î December mu nnaw…îtwe abien a edi kan no mu, na w…îhy…õ da ka nea ebefi mu aba no ho as…õm ansa na December 15 adu, na January 1 na …îs…õmpatr…õwfo foforo no fi adwuma ase.
